title: polypodium draconopterum
intro: Polypodium draconopterum, also known as Dragon Plant or Dragon's Blood, is a species of fern native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. Traditionally, the plant's rhizome is used to make a resin that has been valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polypodium draconopterum include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce pain and inflammation, and support immune function. The resin can be prepared through various herbal preparations, such as tinctures, infusions, and topical applications, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a range of ways.
